title: Blog Commenting

# Blog Commenting

- Code: 9412eab3

transcript.text: So to get blog comments there are two approaches that you can take one is you can just go order them from the ice cream
shop or second one
There's certain searches that you can do on Google where you can try to identify
Comments or blog posts that allow commenting the challenge with those is you end up with a lot of blogs that don't actually allow much commenting
So what this is a list of?
It is a list of domains where you can just come in and add a comment so you can see you got 171 comments here
Let's see in this page
We have 251 comments
So if you want to use this resource just come down here and anytime you see
A URL that has a bunch of comments
You should quickly be able to add your own comment to it
If you don't see that if you go to a URL and it has zero comments
Then what that means is since we made this list
Whoever owns that blog has basically deleted all the spammy trashy comments
And I will give you some of those searches
You can use Google search queries like this make sure that you put it in quotes
This is going to identify exact match
So these exact words leave a comment post a comment add a comment submit a comment write a comment
etc etc those have to appear on that URL and
That will help you find
URLs that allow commenting if you let me delete that if you want
To make it more specific to your niche. You can also add information about your niche
This less important for it to be an exact match
But this basically is some tricks to help you identify some additional blogs if you need more commenting than the
Hundred and nineteen hundred and twenty
Individual URLs that we're just going to give you there
And like I said the easiest way
Well, this is probably very very easy because you can just go here and leave a comment
The second easiest way is and I'll provide a link to it if you head on to the ice cream truck shop
They'll do this for you with 50 blog comments
